---
title: "Niel Bauer Lab Notebook"
---

This is a repository for laboratory methods used throughout my PhD in the Harvey Avian Disease Ecology Laboratory at University of Rhode Island.

# Recent Experiments

##[OSPR RNA extraction 05212026](OSPR_extraction_05212026.qmd)

## [BLVU RNA extraction 05142026](BLVU_RNAext_05142026.qmd)

## [BLVU RNA extraction 05122026](BLVU_RNAext_05122026.qmd)

## [RNA extraction optimzation with 5mm bead](5mm_bead_RNA_extraction.qmd)

## [LN2 RNA extraction](LN2_RNA_extraction_04232026.qmd)


# Standard protocols

[RNA extraction from clotted avian blood](https://drive.google.com/file/d/15hi1ZwH2erNrpRtCeD-SuOWRS-TQnEGG/view?usp=sharing)

[Tri-Reagent/Direct-zol RNA Isolation Protocol](https://github.com/JAHarvey/RNA-Blood-preservation-extraction/blob/main/RNA_Isolation_Protocol.mkd)

[DNA Extraction From Whole Blood Samples](https://github.com/JAHarvey/HarveyLabNotebook/blob/7542b649de4f89e19ee5ca77f3d78b217054b419/Niel%20Bauer%20Lab%20Notebook/DNA_extraction_protocol.qmd)
